Package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

Class OpenDrainAssessment

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.OpenDrainAssessment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OpenDrainAssessment extends Object implements Serializable
One requirement-level assessment in an open-drain review.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenDrainAssessment

      public OpenDrainAssessment(String requirementId, String standard, String clause, OpenDrainAssessment.Status status, String severity, String message, String recommendation)
      Creates an assessment.
      Parameters:
      requirementId - stable requirement identifier
      standard - standard identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      status - requirement status
      severity - severity string such as LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or CRITICAL
      message - finding message
      recommendation - recommended action

  • Method Details

    • pass

      public static OpenDrainAssessment pass(String requirementId, String clause, String message, String recommendation)
      Creates a passing assessment.
      Parameters:
      requirementId - stable requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      message - finding message
      recommendation - recommended action
      Returns:
      passing assessment

    • warning

      public static OpenDrainAssessment warning(String requirementId, String clause, String severity, String message, String recommendation)
      Creates a warning assessment.
      Parameters:
      requirementId - stable requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      severity - severity string
      message - finding message
      recommendation - recommended action
      Returns:
      warning assessment

    • fail

      public static OpenDrainAssessment fail(String requirementId, String clause, String severity, String message, String recommendation)
      Creates a failing assessment.
      Parameters:
      requirementId - stable requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      severity - severity string
      message - finding message
      recommendation - recommended action
      Returns:
      failing assessment

    • info

      public static OpenDrainAssessment info(String requirementId, String clause, String message, String recommendation)
      Creates an informational assessment.

      requirementId - stable requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      message - finding message
      recommendation - recommended action
      Returns:
      informational assessment

      public static OpenDrainAssessment notApplicable(String requirementId, String clause, String message)
      Creates a not-applicable assessment.
      Parameters:
      requirementId - stable requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      message - not-applicable reason
      Returns:
      not-applicable assessment

      this assessment for fluent construction

      private static boolean isJsonSafe(Object value)
      Tests whether a detail value can be written as standards-compliant JSON.

      value - value to test
      Returns:
      true when the value is safe for JSON serialization

      Returns:
      true when status is WARNING
